title: getProperties()
text: getProperties() Returns the properties of this Uniface data object. Return = Object . getProperties() Arguments None Return Value Return A JavaScript object with each attribute representing a field, occurrence, or component property. For example, in JavaScript Object Notation (JSON), such an object is represented as: Explain this code { "style:color" : "red", "html:title" : "incorrect value" } Copy Exceptions The following exceptions may be thrown: uniface.InvalidDataObjectException Example: Setting and Copying a Group of Properties Explain this code webtrigger scope input output endscope javascript var DSPInstance = uniface.getInstance(); var vEnt = DSPInstance.getEntity("ENTITY_A.MY"); var vOcc = vEnt.getOccurrence(0); var vSource = vOcc.getField("SOURCE.ENTITY_A.MY"); var vTarget = vOcc.getField("TARGET.ENTITY_A.MY"); // setting properties vSource.setProperties({"html:class":"form-control input-sm","style:color":"black","backcolor":"pink"}); //copy properties vTarget.setProperties(vSource.getProperties()); endjavascript end Copy Related Links uniface.InvalidDataObjectException Exception thrown if the object on which the function is called is no longer valid. Widgets for Dynamic Server Pages Widget definitions for Dynamic Server Pages (DSPs) are used to generate the HTML elements and controls used to represent fields, labels, occurrences, and entities displayed in the client browser. clearProperties() Restores the initial widget properties of the Uniface data object. getProperty() Returns the value of a property of this Uniface data object. setProperties() Sets widget properties for a Uniface data object in JavaScript. uniface.Entity The uniface.Entity object provides access to selected properties of the component entity that it represents. It is returned by the getEntities and getEntity functions of the uniface.Instance and uniface.Occurrence objects. uniface.Occurrence The uniface.Occurrence object provides access to selected properties of the occurrence that it represents. It is returned by the getOccurrence function of the uniface.Entity object. uniface.Field The uniface.Field object provides access to selected properties of the field that it represents. It is returned by the getField function of uniface.Occurrence. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
